data_quality_notes: Used WB SH.STA.WASH.P5 (mortality rate attributed to unsafe water, unsafe sanitation and lack of hygiene, per 100,000 population) as proxy for child diarrheal mortality. This is a closely related indicator from WHO/WB. Original hypothesis cited IHME cause-specific child mortality database (not available via API).
summary: WASH-attributable mortality proxy vs UWD DALYs: Pearson r=0.914 (p=1.173e-72), Spearman rho=0.843. Partial correlation not computed. Best functional form: quadratic. Hypothesis claimed r≈0.72 for diarrheal mortality vs WASH (Victora et al. 2012, Lancet).
